itemDescription: The abyss is what our ensemble “RUHIG BLUT” holds interest for. Because these abysses function like a magnifier: You discover things which remained misunderstood before but now will be seen most sharply. So, what about this higher education system? How does a chairman of the examination board feel when he can’t allow a student to continue his studies anymore? What does a psychologist say about that? How to keep yourself awake? AND what happens when suddenly one’s imagination is cracking up and a weapon comes into play?
